creator: ahicks@p-o.co.uk
text:
Created attachment 143296
dbmail-3113-3115.diff

DBMail 3.1.15, a bugfix only release.
- The 'login_timeout' value was used when a mailbox was selected,
instead of the 'timeout' value. This would lead to users being logged
out prematurely on less active connections.
- Also remove redundant conflict

Fix:
Apply patch
Poudriere tested
